content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer T, denoting the number of test cases.
- Each test case consists of two lines of input.
- The first line of each test case contains one integer N, denoting the number of cities
- The second line contain 2N space separated integers A1,A2....A2N - the element of an array A.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output the answer on a new line — Yes if the given array represents a valid list of prices, and No otherwise.
